scope_summary: Bounded observe-only target-local investigation of the external browser-visible request path that precedes the localhost AFF cookie-bootstrap window. Work backward from 27/Mar/2026 00:00:43-00:00:51 -0400 in Apache and FireFlow logs, where CommandsDispatcher, /FireFlow/api/session, /fa/server/connection/login, getAFASessionInfo, and storeFireflowCookie appear. Look for immediately preceding non-127.0.0.1 or browser-visible requests, especially /BusinessFlow/rest/v1/login, /BusinessFlow redirects, /algosec-ui/login, /seikan/login/setup, /afa/php/SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php, Keycloak token paths, or /afa/php/home.php. Use SSOLogin.php, BusinessFlowAPI.php, SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php, and utils.php only as supporting source hints. Preserve findings and artifacts only; do not intentionally modify target state.
